opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't stop sneezing, my nose is completely blocked solid, and I feel like I'm suffocating when I try to breathe.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly over the last half-day and it's really frightening me — I feel like I can't get air through my nose at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 12 hours ago, right after I was doing some renovation work at home and there was a lot of dust around
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly half a day, and the blocked nose has got much worse in the last 4 hours
symptom_narrative.character: fits of really violent sneezing, then loads of clear watery stuff pouring out of my nose, and now my nose feels totally blocked solid
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: honestly terrifying — I feel like I'm choking and can't breathe properly, I got into a bit of a panic
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my nose mostly, but my eyes, the roof of my mouth and my throat are all itchy too
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on in a rush and hasn't really let up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — I haven't taken anything for it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: being around the dust from the renovations seems to set it off
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: itchy watery eyes, an itchy nose and throat, and an annoying tickly dry cough at the back of my throat
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get a bit sneezy and stuffy sometimes but never anything like this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still move around fine but I'm completely thrown by it and pretty anxious

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: nothing regular — and I haven't tried any hay-fever or antihistamine tablets for this

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; has been doing home renovations, so there is a lot of dust around the house at the moment

objective_data_offered.value: on video she is breathing through her mouth and her voice sounds blocked and nasal; she is sneezing and clearing her throat frequently
her eyes look watery and she has dark circles under both eyes; there is a faint crease across the lower part of her nose
no visible swelling of the lips or tongue and no rash or hives seen on the face or arms on camera
she pans the camera to show visible dust in the hallway from the ongoing renovation work
